fear: That Mackintosh saw what she did and is deciding right now whether to fire her
name: Patsy Howell
role: Counter assistant, F.W. Woolworth Co., Greensboro
voice: Quick, slightly breathless, the voice of someone managing multiple demands simultaneously and trying not to let any of them show on her face
secrets: She placed the napkin deliberately, not accidentally — it was a conscious act she made in the three seconds Mackintosh had his back turned
She is engaged to a man who works at the Cone Mills plant and has told him nothing about what happened today
knowledge: She knows the coffee urns are full and the grill is operational — there is no mechanical reason service cannot be provided
She has heard Mackintosh's telephone conversations through the office door and knows he has not yet called the police directly
publicFace: A young white woman of about twenty in the pale-blue Woolworth's uniform, who moves behind the counter with the practiced efficiency of someone who has been doing this job since high school
represents: REQUIRES FACT-CHECK — verify whether this is a documented historical individual from the Greensboro sit-in, February 1960
trustLogic: She responds to anyone who makes her feel that her small act of decency has been noticed and will not be weaponized against her; she shuts down if she feels she is being asked to go further than she has already gone
privateGoal: She wants to keep her job, but she is also the person who placed the napkin in front of one of the students — an act she has not yet decided how to explain

aggressionProfile.fleeStyle: Moves immediately to the back kitchen area and does not re-emerge until the floor walker retrieves her
aggressionProfile.chaseStyle: Keeps her head down and does not respond
aggressionProfile.mildPressure: Keeps moving, keeps performing side work, avoids eye contact with both the students and Mackintosh
aggressionProfile.breakingPoint: She will not directly contradict Mackintosh's account of events in front of him
aggressionProfile.fleeCondition: If Mackintosh calls her name from the office stairs
aggressionProfile.heavyPressure: Says quietly that she was just doing her job and that she did not mean anything by it
aggressionProfile.capturedBehavior: Says she cannot talk right now and that she has tables to clear
